name: Nasi Goreng with Chicken.
recipeIngredient: 275 g (10 oz) long grain brown rice, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large non-stick pan and cook the chicken breasts for about 15 to 20 minutes. Remove the chicken and allow it to cool.
2. Add the onions to the pan and cook for 15 minutes until well browned.
3. Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
4. Stir in the spices and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Cut the chicken breasts into small pieces and add them to the pan with the soy sauce, tomato ketchup, and cooked rice.
6. Cover and cook for 20 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Add 15 to 30 mL (1 to 2 tbsp) water if necessary.
